results.title: Ferrari appeals to traditionalists with new V12 manual gearbox limited edition
results.description: Ferrari launched a limited-edition 12-cylinder model with a manual gearbox on ‌Friday, appealing to traditional fans of roaring petrol engines and hands-on driving after the mixed initial reception for its first electric vehicle. Read more... The post Ferrari appeals to traditionalists with new V12 manual gearbox limited edition appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Turkey Isn’t Letting Patti Lupone’s Gay Cruise Ship Through
results.description: Photo: Charles Sykes/Bravo via Getty Images Pride month’s really over, huh. Patti Lupone shared that the country of Turkey is not letting an Atlantic cruise ship through because it’s full of gay men, specifically her fans who were excited to see her perform on the ship. “I am shocked,” she began in an Instagram post [...] The post Turkey Isn’t Letting Patti Lupone’s Gay Cruise Ship Through appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Switzerland Celebrates Historic FIFA World Cup Victory Over Algeria
results.description: Switzerland has made history by defeating Algeria 2-0 in the Round of 32 of the FIFA World Cup 2026, marking their first knockout stage win since 1954. With goals from Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye, the team is eager to build on this success as they prepare for their next match. Ndoye expressed the significance of this victory for both the team and the nation, emphasizing their desire for further achievements. The Swiss side will now focus on their upcoming challenge against either Colombia or Ghana.

results.title: India’s position on Indus Waters Treaty consistent, it stands in abeyance: MEA
results.description: New Delhi, Jul 3 (PTI) India’s position on the Indus Waters Treaty is consistent and the treaty stands in abeyance in response to Pakistan’s continued support for cross-border terrorism, the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) said on Friday. India suspended the treaty in 2025 as one of the punitive measures against Pakistan after the April [...]

results.title: England Reveals Squad for Second T20I Against India at Old Trafford
results.description: As the second T20I between England and India approaches, England has announced their playing eleven, featuring debutant Josh Tongue and the return of Jofra Archer. The first match ended in no result due to rain, but both teams are eager to take the lead in the series. Key performances from players like Abhishek Sharma and Shreyas Iyer highlighted India's batting strength, while the English side looks to bounce back. Read on for more details about the match and player insights.
